history.summary: Renamed Entropy to Portfolio Brain; added meeting-prep and scenario-modeling skills

changes.description: Customer intelligence folder renamed from Entropy/ to Portfolio Brain/
changes.agent_instructions: Rename your Entropy/ folder to Portfolio Brain/. Update all wikilinks from [[Entropy/...]] to [[Portfolio Brain/...]] and update any paths in CLAUDE.md.
Copy _skills/meeting-prep.md from the latest vault download into your Portfolio Brain/_skills/ folder.

changes.description: New skill: scenario modeling and what-if analysis
changes.agent_instructions: Copy _skills/scenario-modeling.md from the latest vault download into your Portfolio Brain/_skills/ folder.
